zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Hogge於1395年出生在英國史洛普爾時，她的父親Robert Hogge20歲，母親Mrs. Robert Hogge21歲。她於1403年與Sir John Colynson Rowlowe在英國英格蘭賀福爾哈特菲爾德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1437年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾沃費爾德享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Hogge于1395年出生在英国史洛普爾时，她的父亲Robert Hogge20岁，母亲Mrs. Robert Hogge21岁。她于1403年与Sir John Colynson Rowlowe在英国英格兰賀福爾哈特菲爾德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1437年在英国英格兰史洛普爾沃費爾德享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hogge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hogg
meanings: English (northern England and Scotland): nickname for a swineherd or shepherd, from Middle English hog(ge) (Old English hogg) denoting either a pig, especially a castrated one, or a young sheep before its first shearing (the latter sense is most likely in northern England).
German (Högg): topographic name, a variant of Heck 1, found chiefly in Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Hogge was born in 1395, in Shropshire, England, her father, Robert Hogge, was 20 and her mother, Mrs. Robert Hogge, was 21. She married Sir John Colynson Rowlowe in 1403, in Hatfield, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1437, in Worfield, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Hogge est née en 1395, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Hogge, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Hogge, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Colynson Rowlowe en 1403, à Hatfield, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1437, à Worfield, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Hogge 1395 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Hogge 20 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Robert Hogge 21. Sie hat 1403 in Hatfield, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Colynson Rowlowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1437 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Worfield, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir John Colynson Rowlowe nel 1403, nel Hatfield, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1437, nel Worfield, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Hoggeが1395年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Hoggeは20歳，母Mrs. Robert Hoggeは21歳であった。1403年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハトフィールドでSir John Colynson Rowloweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1437年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウオルフィールドで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Hogge(이)가 1395년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Hogge(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Hogge(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1403년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 하트필드에서 Sir John Colynson Rowlowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 워필드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она умерла в 1437 г. в местности ворфиелд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.
